title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rivigo South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Rivigo South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Rivigo South Asia Partners family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Rajkot. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Rivigo South Asia Partners:
Rivigo South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rivigo South Asia Partners!
